title: Anti-Corruption Directive: What the EU Gets Wrong About Fighting Corruption [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Poland’s accession to the European Union was accompanied by the creation of robust legal and institutional frameworks to combat corruption, which two decades ago was a systemic problem permeating both everyday life and the highest levels of power, posing a serious threat to democracy and the economy.
